description_long: This is a retro-style SMEG refrigerator with a smooth, glossy white exterior and rounded edges, evoking a mid-20th-century aesthetic. The front features two distinct doors, each equipped with a prominent, curved chrome handle, with the upper section likely serving as the main fridge compartment and the lower as a freezer. The SMEG logo is prominently displayed in metallic lettering at the top center of the front door. The sides and back are plain, with a continuous, seamless white finish and no visible vents or grilles. The refrigerator stands upright and has a compact, boxy form, making it suitable for kitchens, garages, or urban interiors. The overall design emphasizes both functionality and visual appeal, with a sturdy build and minimalistic detailing.
description: A glossy white SMEG refrigerator with rounded edges, chrome handles, and a retro design. The front features two doors and a prominent brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the SMEG logo, two chrome handles, and the main doors.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth, seamless white surface and the profile of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain, unadorned white surface and rounded corners.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile and the protruding chrome handles.
attribute_brand_logo: The SMEG logo is visible on the upper front door, centered, with metallic letters in a classic serif font.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding, curved chrome handles placed horizontally on the left side of each door.
